name: open-hanzi-cards
description: Free web-based flash card app for learning Chinese vocabulary and characters

scripts.gen-tts: cd tts && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python generate.py
scripts.gen-strokes: cd strokes && python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python generate.py

author: Iannis de Zwart
